migration_risks.visibility: Critical sections may be overlooked if not in root

migration_risks.navigation: More files to navigate may slow initial understanding

recommendations.action: Keep enforcement and interrupt handler content highly visible in root
Bundle related sections together (e.g., ultrathink + pre-ultrathink)
Create strong import mechanism with clear module loading directives
Add module status tracking to ensure all components load correctly
Include fallback to monolithic file if module loading fails
Consider creating visualization of module dependencies

success_metrics: All critical enforcement visible in root
test_scenarios: Verify ULTRATHINK triggers on development requests
Check enforcement gates still block invalid operations
Confirm handler search and loading works
Test error handling with missing modules
